title: juncus ingens
intro: Juncus ingens, also known as the Giant Rush or Giant Club Rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Juncus ingens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Juncus ingens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
